name: Skeleton War
short_description: Welcome to Skull Wars. This is a top-down rogue's anti-skull time survival game with rich and interlinked map enemy character weapon skill props. Each game contains a number of well-designed levels, exploring each unique gameplay experience in repeated rounds of exhilaration and excitement.
detailed_description:
After experiencing various crises created by small skulls, face the final boss head-on and defeat it by combining your maneuvering skills with the unique builds you've accumulated from previous levels!

Game Features
Weapons preset to auto-fire!
Fast-paced (about 30 minutes or less)!
There are dozens of skills waiting to be unlocked by you, so I'm sure you'll be able to come up with a satisfying play style out of the whole thing (High Risk Output, Iron Bastard, Running Fast, Spell Mechanic Style, and many other categories)!
Hundreds of props and weapons for you to pick from (Judge's Pen, Grand Wizard's Staff, Water Gun, Samurai Sword, and many more)!
Each skeleton wave lasts 25~120 seconds, find a way to destroy as many enemies as you can in that time and survive!
Pick up Skull Coins for upgrades and get some items from the store in between each wave!

Free to choose your start
Starting Character of Your Choice: You can choose from a number of characters with different styles of gameplay and experience, each with their own unique talents and growth mechanisms, bringing differentiated and enjoyable interactions!
Initial weapon of your choice: Before entering a new adventure, you can choose the initial weapon you want and the only one you can rely on in the first level (slingshot is highly recommended for newbies, version T0), and find out which one suits you best to start your journey!

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
